issues.claim: Reproducible in code or org practice (not pure metaphor)
issues.objection: 4.40 concrete_scenario describes a configuration observable in real engineering practice — the implication is testable: 'Identify any decision in your queue that has been open for more than two months without co…'. The diagnostic uses observable artifacts (PRs, design docs, dashboards, postmortems) and observable behaviours (decision-timelines, recovery times after praise/criticism, substrate-knowledge depth). STRETCHED tagging honest where the metaphysics exceeds reproducibility; the engineering shadow remains reproducible.

notes: Reproducibility test for 4.40: a senior engineer reading this verse can apply the diagnostic to her own team and observe the artifact-level signal. PASS.
